meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to design with AI, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, and ship professional SaaS apps at scale.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing syntax errors manually. By designing your architecture with AI-first workflows, you treat code as a modular output rather than a manual chore. Use Antigravity for structural planning and Claude Code for iterative refinement, turning complex debugging cycles into automated, high-velocity development sprints that impress every client.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client’s deadline is looming, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You’re staring at a stack trace that looks like an alien language, realizing the logic you wrote six hours ago has become an unmanageable mess. This is the silent killer of freelance momentum: the debugging bottleneck.

But what if you stopped 'fixing' code and started 'designing' it with AI? By shifting your mindset from manual coder to AI-orchestrator, you can bypass the tedious trial-and-error loop. This guide reveals how to leverage elite tools to turn your development workflow into a high-octane production line.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to define your system boundaries. This prevents debugging by design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements. Create a robust, modular architecture diagram that minimizes side effects and ensures unidirectional data flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --architect 'Review this directory structure for potential circular dependencies'

steps.title: Context-Aware Error Injection
steps.description: Feed specific error logs into the AI to identify root causes rather than symptoms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I have these recurring errors in my React state management. Map these errors against my current architecture and suggest a refactor.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --fix 'Analyze the last 50 lines of error output and propose a permanent structural patch'

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Automate the creation of test suites to ensure that patches don't break existing functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate high-coverage Jest test cases for the module identified as the primary failure point.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test 'Generate unit tests for all functions in src/utils and execute them'

steps.title: Refactoring for Maintainability
steps.description: Clean up 'spaghetti code' that makes debugging difficult by using AI to enforce clean code principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this component to adhere to SOLID principles, reducing cyclomatic complexity while maintaining current functionality.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --refactor 'Simplify logic in this file and remove redundant conditional nesting'

steps.title: Final Integration Audit
steps.description: Perform a final sweep across the codebase to ensure integration points are stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a holistic audit of the updated module against the original project requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --audit 'Check all imports and exports for consistency after the recent refactor'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'system constraints' file before starting a debug session to prevent it from suggesting libraries you aren't using.
Use Claude Code to create a 'debug log' file that tracks every change made during a session to maintain an audit trail for your clients.
When stuck, ask the AI to explain the code as if you were a junior developer; the simplified explanation often reveals the logical flaw.
Leverage Antigravity to visualize data flow; debugging is 90% understanding the state transitions, not the syntax.
Set up a pre-commit hook that runs an AI-based linting command via Claude Code to catch potential bugs before they even hit your git history.
content.next_steps: Apply these workflows to your next client project, document the time saved, and begin building a library of reusable, AI-vetted components.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business with elite AI workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
